final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo for a candy shop called "doces da Lis".

Style/medium: flat vector logo illustration, Hello Kitty and Friends style (cute, kawaii)
Composition: cat centered on top of the logo text, lily flower on the cat's head, balanced and charming layout
Subject: a cute brown chocolate-toned cat in Hello Kitty and Friends style, sitting on top of the shop name; a yellow lily flower resting on the cat's head
Scene/backdrop: baby yellow and candy pink background
Lighting/mood: soft, sweet, playful
Color palette: baby yellow and candy pink background; cat in chocolate brown tone; yellow lily flower
Materials/textures: clean flat vector illustration
Text (verbatim): doces da Lis
Constraints: cute and pretty font for the shop name; cat must clearly reference Hello Kitty and Friends aesthetic
Avoid: realistic style, dark tones, complex gradients, cluttered composition
